meta_description: AI-powered Telegram intelligence that surfaces what matters from your channels — so you never miss a critical signal again.

hero.headline: Stop losing {{gradient:signals}} in the noise
hero.subheadline: AI-powered intelligence that surfaces what matters from your Telegram channels — so your team never misses a critical message again.

cta.note: Free during beta. No credit card required.

problem.label: The Problem
problem.headline: Your Telegram channels are {{gradient:working against you}}
problem.description: Teams and communities generate thousands of messages daily. The important ones get buried.

points.title: Message overload
points.description: Hundreds of messages across dozens of channels every day. No human can keep up.

points.title: Buried signals
points.description: Critical intel — complaints, opportunities, threats — lost in a river of noise.

points.title: Zero searchability
points.description: Telegram's built-in search is keyword-only. Finding context means scrolling for hours.

solution.label: The Solution
solution.headline: Meet {{gradient:TeleMind}}
solution.description: An AI layer that watches your Telegram channels 24/7, understands context, and delivers the intelligence that matters — before you even know to look for it.
bullets: Semantic search — find messages by meaning, not just keywords
AI-generated daily digests delivered to your inbox
Real-time signal detection for complaints, opportunities, and threats
Works across unlimited channels and groups

features.label: Capabilities
features.headline: Everything you need to {{gradient:own the conversation}}
features.description: Built for teams who move fast and can't afford to miss what matters.

items.title: Semantic Search
items.description: Ask questions in plain English. TeleMind understands context, not just keywords.

items.title: Daily Intelligence Briefs
items.description: Wake up to an AI-curated summary of everything important from the last 24 hours.

items.title: Real-Time Alerts
items.description: Get instant notifications when TeleMind detects complaints, pricing changes, or competitor mentions.

items.title: Contextual Memory
items.description: TeleMind remembers conversations across time. Ask about trends, not just individual messages.

items.title: Zero Setup
items.description: Add TeleMind to your channels. It starts learning immediately. No configuration required.

items.title: Private & Secure
items.description: Your data never leaves your infrastructure. Self-hosted option available for enterprise.

final_cta.headline: Ready to {{gradient:stop missing signals}}?
final_cta.subheadline: Join the teams already using TeleMind to turn Telegram noise into actionable intelligence.
